examples.title: Comparing Numbers with Different Number of Digits
examples.content:
Compare 237 and 89. Which is greater?

**Solution:**
- 237 has 3 digits
- 89 has 2 digits
- A number with more digits is larger
- Therefore: $237 > 89$ (237 is greater than 89)

examples.title: Comparing Numbers with the Same Number of Digits
examples.content:
Compare 614 and 621. Which is greater?

**Solution:**
- Both have 3 digits
- Compare the hundreds place: 6 = 6 (same)
- Compare the tens place: 1 < 2
- Since 621 has more in the tens place, $621 > 614$ (621 is greater than 614)
